title: Managing MTD at scale
summaryBody: Take control of MTD with FreeAgent's leading solution
detailBody: Automate your data collection. Secure bank feeds, bulk reconsent, smart capture and AI categorisation provide your team with reliable data from day one.
Centralise your MTD oversight. Monitor all client submission statuses from one Practice Dashboard. This provides total visibility of every upcoming tax obligation in one place.
Automate your quarterly workflow. Establish a consistent "review, approve, and submit" rhythm. A unified process ensures efficient accuracy across your entire portfolio.

detailBlocks.text: **Automate your data collection.** Secure bank feeds, bulk reconsent, smart capture and AI categorisation provide your team with reliable data from day one. **Centralise your MTD oversight.** Monitor all client submission statuses from one Practice Dashboard. This provides total visibility of every upcoming tax obligation in one place. **Automate your quarterly workflow.**Establish a consistent "review, approve, and submit" rhythm. A unified process ensures efficient accuracy across your entire portfolio.
